title: reutera lutea
intro: Reutera lutea, also known as the desert broom or yellow rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Reutera lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
